meta.description: Design tokens and component-level UI specs for the Resume Builder page

pageHeader.container: flex-shrink-0 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-4 shadow-sm lg:px-6
pageHeader.title: text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900

mobileTabSwitcher.container: sticky top-0 z-20 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 lg:hidden

button.base: flex-1 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

circle.base: flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all duration-200

connector.track: flex-1 mx-1 mt-4 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-gray-200 overflow-hidden

formCard.container: mt-6 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm

inputField.base: mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500
inputField.small: rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500

selectField.base: mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500

richTextEditor.container: mt-1 border border-gray-300 rounded-md overflow-hidden focus-within:border-blue-500 focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-blue-500
richTextEditor.toolbar: border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-2 py-1 flex gap-1

buttonPrimary.base: rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-6 py-2 text-sm text-white hover:bg-blue-700

buttonSecondary.base: rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50

buttonDashed.base: rounded-md border border-dashed border-gray-300 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:border-gray-400 hover:text-gray-700

saveDraftButton.base: flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

validationErrorBanner.container: mb-6 rounded-lg bg-red-50 border border-red-200 p-4
validationErrorBanner.heading: text-sm font-medium text-red-800
validationErrorBanner.list: mt-2 text-sm text-red-700 list-disc list-inside space-y-1

profilePhoto.preview: h-20 w-20 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-gray-200
profilePhoto.placeholder: flex h-20 w-20 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-100 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 text-2xl text-gray-400
profilePhoto.removeButton: absolute -top-1 -right-1 flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500 text-xs text-white hover:bg-red-600
profilePhoto.uploadButton: cursor-pointer rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50

additionalLink.label: text-xs font-medium text-blue-700/70 mb-2
additionalLink.addButton: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full border border-dashed border-blue-400 px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors

aiButton.idle: flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md bg-violet-600 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-violet-700 transition-colors
aiButton.generating: flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md bg-violet-100 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-violet-400 cursor-not-allowed
aiButton.spinner: h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-violet-300 border-t-transparent

suggestionsTray.container: rounded-xl border border-violet-200 bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-50 via-indigo-50 to-blue-50 p-4 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.12)]
suggestionsTray.badge: inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-violet-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-violet-700
suggestionsTray.chipDefault: cursor-pointer border border-violet-300 bg-white text-violet-800 shadow-sm hover:border-violet-400 hover:bg-violet-50 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm transition-colors
suggestionsTray.chipAdded: cursor-not-allowed bg-violet-200/50 text-violet-400 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm

categoryCard.nameInput: flex-1 rounded-md border border-slate-300 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400 focus:border-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500/20
categoryCard.removeCategoryButton: rounded-md p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors
categoryCard.skillPill: inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-slate-100 px-3 py-1 text-sm text-slate-700
categoryCard.addInput: flex-1 rounded-md border border-slate-300 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400 focus:border-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500/20
categoryCard.addButton: rounded-md bg-slate-700 px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-slate-800

skillsStep.addCategoryButton: w-full rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 transition-colors hover:border-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600

languagesSection.title: mb-3 text-sm font-semibold text-blue-900
languagesSection.proficiencySelect: rounded-md border border-blue-300 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-slate-900 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20
languagesSection.addInput: flex-1 rounded-md border border-blue-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20
languagesSection.addButton: rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700

generateButton.idle: inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
generateButton.generating: inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed

summaryStep.errorBox: mt-2 rounded-md bg-red-50 p-3 text-sm text-red-700

templateCard.thumbnail: aspect-[8.5/11] bg-gray-50 rounded-t-xl flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
templateCard.activeBadge: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-blue-500 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-semibold
templateCard.lockBadge: absolute top-2 right-2 bg-amber-500 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-1
templateCard.atsBadge: absolute bottom-14 right-2 bg-green-500 text-white text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-semibold
templateCard.name: font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm truncate
templateCard.tierBadge: mt-1.5 inline-block text-xs font-semibold text-purple-700 bg-purple-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full capitalize

templateSwitcherModal.title: text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900
templateSwitcherModal.closeButton: text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 w-9 h-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors text-2xl flex-shrink-0

categoryTabs.active: px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-blue-500 text-white whitespace-nowrap
categoryTabs.inactive: px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 whitespace-nowrap

templateSwitcherModal.grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-4
templateSwitcherModal.switchingOverlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50
templateSwitcherModal.switchingCard: bg-white rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 shadow-2xl
templateSwitcherModal.loadingSpinner: h-10 w-10 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent

header.container: sticky top-0 z-10 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm
header.title: text-sm font-medium text-gray-700

zoomControls.minusButton: flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white text-sm text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-40 transition-colors
zoomControls.plusButton: flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white text-sm text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-40 transition-colors
zoomControls.fitButton: ml-1 rounded border border-gray-300 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-xs text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors

previewPanel.chooseTemplateButton: flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors

header.container: flex-shrink-0 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm
header.backLink: flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-800 transition-colors
header.title: text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900

completionView.editButton: rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors
completionView.exportPdfButton: rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors
completionView.analyzeButton: rounded-md bg-blue-600 px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5

loadingSpinner.spinner: h-8 w-8 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-blue-200 border-t-blue-600

uploadProgress.note: Rendered below form card only when status is non-null

editorial_earth_tone.sidebar: vertical dark pill accent, earth tones #483930, beige bg #EFEBE3

errors.noEducation: At least one education entry is required

errors.tooShort: Professional Summary must be at least 100 characters

generateSkills.body: { targetRole: string, targetIndustry: string, forceRefresh?: boolean }
generateSkills.response: { categories: Array<{category: string, items: string[]}>, languages: Array<{language: string, proficiency: string}> }

generateSummary.body: { targetRole, targetIndustry, targetCountry, education, experience, projects, skills }
